name: ch35-opener-scales-of-alignment
prompt: Simple, cartoon-like educational illustration with clean lines and a warm color palette: A large ornate balance scale in the center. On one side sits a powerful, glowing AI brain growing increasingly large and bright. On the other side, a group of friendly human figures and small robots work together to add weights to keep the scale balanced, representing alignment and oversight efforts keeping pace with capability growth. The scene is set against a sunrise horizon, suggesting the frontier of AI development. The style should be friendly and approachable, like a comic strip or an XKCD-inspired infographic, with expressive characters and minimal visual clutter. Suitable for a technical textbook. No text or lettering in the image.

name: ch35-scalable-oversight-ladder
prompt: Simple, cartoon-like educational illustration with clean lines and a warm color palette: A tall ladder stretching upward, with a human evaluator climbing it to check the work of increasingly capable robots on higher platforms. At the lower rungs, a small robot shows simple text and the human easily gives a thumbs up. At middle rungs, a medium robot shows complex code and the human squints and struggles. At the top rungs, a large robot shows advanced mathematical proofs and the human cannot reach high enough to see them, standing on tiptoes. A second helper robot offers the human a jetpack (AI-assisted evaluation) to reach the top. The scene illustrates the scalable oversight problem. The style should be friendly and approachable, like a comic strip or an XKCD-inspired infographic, with expressive characters and minimal visual clutter. Suitable for a technical textbook. No text or lettering in the image.

name: ch35-agent-reliability-circuit-breaker
prompt: Simple, cartoon-like educational illustration with clean lines and a warm color palette: A robot assembly line where each robot performs a step in a workflow, passing items down the line. One robot in the middle has gone haywire, spinning in circles (infinite loop). A large red circuit breaker switch on the wall has been flipped, and a safety barrier drops down to isolate the broken robot from the rest of the line. The downstream robots pause and wait. A mechanic robot rushes over with a toolkit. Items already past the broken point continue safely to completion. The scene illustrates circuit breakers and graceful degradation in agent reliability. The style should be friendly and approachable, like a comic strip or an XKCD-inspired infographic, with expressive characters and minimal visual clutter. Suitable for a technical textbook. No text or lettering in the image.

name: ch35-self-improving-agent
prompt: Simple, cartoon-like educational illustration with clean lines and a warm color palette: A robot looking into a mirror, but the reflection shows a slightly improved version of itself (shinier, with better tools, more efficient design). Behind the robot is a trail of previous versions of itself, each progressively less refined, stretching back into the past. In front of the mirror, the robot is adjusting its own gears and upgrading its own components based on what it sees. A small feedback loop arrow connects the robot to its reflection. The scene illustrates self-improving and adaptive agents that learn from their own deployment experience. The style should be friendly and approachable, like a comic strip or an XKCD-inspired infographic, with expressive characters and minimal visual clutter. Suitable for a technical textbook. No text or lettering in the image.

name: ch35-human-ai-collaboration
prompt: Simple, cartoon-like educational illustration with clean lines and a warm color palette: A human and a robot sitting side by side at a large shared desk, collaborating on a project. The human sketches creative ideas on paper while the robot rapidly processes data on a screen. They pass notes back and forth. Above them, a combined thought bubble shows their ideas merging into something neither could create alone: the human's creative spark combined with the robot's analytical precision forms a brilliant lightbulb. The desk has both traditional tools (pencils, books) and digital tools (screens, keyboards). The style should be friendly and approachable, like a comic strip or an XKCD-inspired infographic, with expressive characters and minimal visual clutter. Suitable for a technical textbook. No text or lettering in the image.
